rag_rules: Place input range assumptions in component type annexes using visible feature names and concrete bounds.
Use AGREE syntax for assumptions and guarantees with valid component scope and typed expressions.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE contracts are placed in valid scopes (type vs implementation) based on the target component.
Validate that all referenced identifiers are visible in the current AGREE scope.
Use typed expressions in AGREE to match the actual AADL data types of features and ports.
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed as typed features.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Assumptions and guarantees must reference valid identifiers in the current scope.
Boolean expressions in AGREE must match the expected data types of the features involved.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level assignments or guarantees in component type scopes.
Do not assume AADL property names are automatically available as AGREE variables.
irrelevant_topics: Model fusion and scope preservation rules
